ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the travel agency (e.g., Travel Agency, Broker) */,
  "distribution_channel" TEXT /* Distribution channel used by the agency (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Address of the travel agency */,
  "agency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the travel agency */,
  "agency_email" TEXT /* Email address of the travel agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency branch */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel agency that owns the branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency branch */,
  "branch_address" TEXT /* Address of the agency branch */,
  "branch_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency branch */,
  "branch_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agency branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_branches_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance product */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details of the coverage provided by the insurance product */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount of the insurance product */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount of the insurance product */,
  "policy_term" INTEGER /* Policy term of the insurance product (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance product that the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the product variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the product variant */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount of the product variant */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount of the product variant */,
  "policy_term" INTEGER /* Policy term of the product variant (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel agency that made the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales amount */,
  "commission_value" REAL /* Commission value earned by the agency */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination of the travel */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel used to make the sale (e.g., Online, Offline, Phone) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance claim */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales transaction associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the claim (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Male, Female, None) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the destination is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel destination */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the travel destination */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken at the travel destination */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used at the travel destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Sales, Claims) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., Sales, Claims, Customers) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Sales, Claims, Customer Analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Rewards offered by the loyalty program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)
